title: 4 Stocks Shining as Bargains
text: When browsing the market for bargain opportunities in U.S.-listed stocks, investors may want to consider the following stocks, as they meet the bargain criteria below:

title: Permian Basin Oil Rig Count Falls, Granite Wash Tally Rises
text: In its weekly release, Baker Hughes Company (BKR) reports that the oil rig count is lower in the Permian Basin.

title: EOG Resources: Giant FCF And Strong Assets
text: EOG Resources has a dividend yield of more than 3% and a special dividend yield that takes that to the high-single digits. EOG Resources is spending $4.5 billion on capital growth, a level that it can comfortably afford.

title: Forget Occidental Petroleum: Here Are 4 Better Oil Picks

title: Can APA Corp Ride the Oil and Gas Tailwinds?
text: As the economy continues recovering from the pandemic, oil and gas prices have stabilized at relatively high levels due to the combination of travel picking back up and Russia's invasion of Ukraine. Fossil fuel companies have profited enormously from this surge in demand.
